Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Two studies in compiler optimisations 48 upvotes, 1 comments
  2. Quantization from the Ground Up 226 upvotes, 45 comments
  3. My astrophotography in the movie Project Hail Mary 786 upvotes, 193 comments
  4. The EU still wants to scan your private messages and photos 887 upvotes, 240 comments
  5. Running Tesla Model 3's computer on my desk using parts from crashed cars 499 upvotes, 138 comments
  6. The Mystery of Rennes-Le-Château, Part 1: The Priest's Treasure 17 upvotes, 1 comments
  7. False claims in a widely-cited paper 217 upvotes, 71 comments
  8. FreeCAD v1.1 213 upvotes, 70 comments
  9. My DIY FPGA board can run Quake II 105 upvotes, 33 comments
  10. Rendering complex scripts in terminal and OSC 66 27 upvotes, 5 comments
  11. More precise elevation data for GraphHopper routing engine 8 upvotes, 0 comments
  12. Show HN: A plain-text cognitive architecture for Claude Code 65 upvotes, 20 comments
  13. Squirrel seen 'vaping' in London park 18 upvotes, 3 comments
  14. Thoughts on slowing the fuck down 761 upvotes, 362 comments
  15. Earthquake scientists reveal how overplowing weakens soil at experimental farm 137 upvotes, 55 comments
  16. Updates to GitHub Copilot interaction data usage policy 269 upvotes, 122 comments
  17. Apple randomly closes bug reports unless you "verify" the bug remains unfixed 342 upvotes, 192 comments
  18. The truth that haunts the Ramones: 'They sold more T-shirts than records' 52 upvotes, 22 comments
  19. VitruvianOS – Desktop Linux Inspired by the BeOS 346 upvotes, 210 comments
  20. 90% of Claude-linked output going to GitHub repos w <2 stars 232 upvotes, 137 comments
  21. ARC-AGI-3 328 upvotes, 207 comments
  22. Woman who never stopped updating her lost dog's chip reunites with him after 11y 144 upvotes, 85 comments
  23. Show HN: Robust LLM Extractor for Websites in TypeScript 15 upvotes, 5 comments
  24. "Disregard That" Attacks 47 upvotes, 26 comments
  25. Sodium-ion EV battery breakthrough delivers 11-min charging and 450 km range 151 upvotes, 106 comments
  26. Supreme Court Sides with Cox in Copyright Fight over Pirated Music 320 upvotes, 254 comments
  27. Show HN: Optio – Orchestrate AI coding agents in K8s to go from ticket to PR 38 upvotes, 22 comments
  28. Do Architects Still Need to Draw? (2020) 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Jury finds Meta liable in case over child sexual exploitation on its platforms 345 upvotes, 450 comments
  30. Miscellanea: The War in Iran 487 upvotes, 704 comments

Last generated 2:00pm, 26 March 2026. Source here.
